metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Billy Joel - Allentown.flac
metadata.title: Allentown
metadata.lyrics:
[00:18.93] Well, we're living here in Allentown
[00:23.15] And they're closing all the factories down
[00:27.30] Out in Bethlehem, they're killing time
[00:31.21] Filling out forms, standing in line
[00:35.75] Well, our fathers fought the Second World War
[00:40.00] Spent their weekends on the Jersey Shore
[00:44.34] Met our mothers in the USO
[00:48.12] Asked them to dance, danced with them slow
[00:52.77] And we're living here in Allentown
[00:57.11] But the restlessness was handed down
[01:01.33] And it's getting very hard to stay
[01:10.42] 
[01:20.03] Well, we're waiting here in Allentown
[01:24.33] For the Pennsylvania we never found
[01:28.61] For the promises our teachers gave
[01:32.44] If we worked hard, if we behaved
[01:37.08] So the graduations hang on the wall
[01:41.20] But they never really helped us at all
[01:45.38] No, they never taught us what was real
[01:49.28] Iron and coke, chromium steel
[01:53.75] And we're waiting here in Allentown
[01:58.04] But they've taken all the coal from the ground
[02:02.39] And the union people crawled away
[02:16.34] Every child had a pretty good shot
[02:20.21] To get at least as far as their old man got
[02:24.49] But something happened on the way to that place
[02:28.65] They threw an American flag in our face
[02:37.13] Whoa-oh-oh
[02:39.91] 
[02:43.43] Well, I'm living here in Allentown
[02:47.64] And it's hard to keep a good man down
[02:51.98] But I won't be getting up today
[03:00.87] 
[03:28.54] And it's getting very hard to stay
[03:34.28] And we're living here in Allentown
[03:37.24]
